weapons.name: Implant Attack
weapons.abilities: Extra Attack(1), Hits automatically wound the target    -

weapons.name: BASIC BIOMORPHS
weapons.range: BASIC BIOMORPHS
weapons.abilities: BASIC BIOMORPHS BASIC BIOMORPHS BASIC BIOMORPHS BASIC BIOMORPHS POINTS

weapons.name: Acid Maw
weapons.range: The model may re-roll one to wound roll in melee per battle round.

weapons.name: Adrenal Glands
weapons.range: The model gains "Haste(2")".

weapons.name: Enhanced Senses
weapons.range: The model gains the "Acute Senses" ability.

weapons.name: Heightened Reflexes
weapons.range: If the unit has not already activated this turn, it may immediately use up its order and fire at an enemy unit within 18" that is deployed as reinforcement as if it had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

weapons.name: Pathogenesis
weapons.range: The model adds +3" to all of its ranged weapons.

weapons.name: Relentless Hunger
weapons.range: The model gains +3" for its Consolidation moves.

weapons.name: Toxin Sacs
weapons.range: The model gains +1 Strength and the "Poison(4+)" ability for all melee attacks.

weapons.name: Point costs are paid per unit.
ADVANCED BIOMORPHS
weapons.range: ADVANCED BIOMORPHS
weapons.abilities: ADVANCED BIOMORPHS ADVANCED BIOMORPHS ADVANCED BIOMORPHS ADVANCED BIOMORPHS POINTS

weapons.name: Acid Blood
weapons.range: The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

weapons.name: Extremely Volatile
weapons.range: The model always explodes like a vehicle. The explosion is resolved at Strength 7.

weapons.name: Implant Attack
weapons.range: The model gains the "Implant Attack" weapon.

weapons.name: Infrasonic Roar
weapons.range: The model gains the "Suppression" ability for all ranged attacks made against targets within 12".

weapons.name: Resonance Barb
weapons.range: The models gains +1 to all tests for manifesting a psychic power.

weapons.name: Symbiote Rippers
weapons.range: The model gains the "Symbiote Rippers" weapon.

weapons.name: Thornback
weapons.range: The model doubles the final combat result for its own army in each melee in which it participates.

weapons.name: Tusked
weapons.range: The model gains +1 additional attack as a Charge bonus.

weapons.name: Warped
weapons.range: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

weapons.name: Point costs are paid for every model of the unit.
SPECIAL BIOMORPHS
weapons.range: SPECIAL BIOMORPHS
weapons.abilities: SPECIAL BIOMORPHS SPECIAL BIOMORPHS SPECIAL BIOMORPHS SPECIAL BIOMORPHS POINTS

weapons.name: Endless
weapons.range: If the unit is below half its starting strength or is destroyed, it can be removed from the field once per game at the end of the battle round and automatically reappears as a reserve at full starting strength in the next battle round.

weapons.name: Feeder Tendrils
weapons.range: The model gains the "Prefered Enemy(everything)" ability for itself and any friendly unit in the same melee combat.

weapons.name: Hardened Carapace
weapons.range: The model improves its armor save by +1.

weapons.name: Leaping
weapons.range: The model gains the "Frenzy(6")" ability.

weapons.name: Norn Crown
weapons.range: The model may cast and deny 1 more psychic power per battle round.

weapons.name: Regeneration
weapons.range: The model gains the "Regeneration(1)" ability.

weapons.name: Scuttlers
weapons.range: The model gains the "Vanguard" ability.

weapons.name: Synaptic Node
weapons.range: The model gains the "Fearless" and "Synapse" ability. Only a single unit per army may take this Biomorph.

weapons.name: Winged
weapons.range: The model gains +6" Movement as well as the "Anti-Grav" and "Deep Strike" abilities.

weapons.name: Point costs are paid for every model of the unit.
